requests/sessions.py: def resolve_redirects(self, resp, req, stream=False, timeout=None, verify=True, cert=None, proxies=None):
gen = self.resolve_redirects(resp, req, stream=stream, timeout=timeout, verify=verify, cert=cert, proxies=proxies)
history = [r for r in gen] if allow_redirects else []
resp = self.send(prep, stream=stream, timeout=timeout, verify=verify, cert=cert, proxies=proxies)

label_rationale: The refactored redirect handling reassembles history by inserting the initial response and popping the last, changing the semantics of how the final response and its .history are constructed. This subtle domain-logic error in edge-case response/history assembly caused issue #1133 needing a fix.
